name: Tomato Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the tomatoes and chop into small pieces.
2. Chop celery, onions, and peppers into fine pieces.
3. Mix the chopped vegetables with salt in a bowl.
4. Place mixture in refrigerator overnight to drain.
5. In a large saucepan, combine sugar, spices (ground cloves, cinnamon, black pepper), and vinegar. Stir until sugar dissolves.
6. Bring mixture to boil and simmer for 3 minutes.
7. Add the drained vegetables and return to boil.
8. Simmer for an additional 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
9. Remove cheesecloth bag containing mustard seeds.
10. Spoon into hot sterilized jars and seal.
